subject: IRCTC Ticket Refund — ₹1,200 Pending in Your Account
body_text:
Dear Passenger,

Your IRCTC ticket cancellation refund of ₹1,200 is pending. To receive your refund, please verify your bank account details at:

http://irctc-ticket-refund.xyz/claim

You will need: PNR number, registered mobile, bank account number.

IRCTC Customer Service
